title: Subquery + pin operator: ids from outside query
prompt: Write `MyApp.Accounts.list_users_by_cached_ids/1` that takes a list of user ids (ordered — ranking from a cache), returns users in that ID order. Use `where: u.id in ^ids` to filter, then reorder in memory via `Enum.sort_by/2` matching the cache order. Pin the ids list. Write to `lib/my_app/accounts.ex`.
tier_rationale: Pinning + post-query sort is a common real-world pattern. Must remember Ecto won't preserve the input order.
